untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'important fundamental development is announced' and 'market establishes initial directional bias within first bar' — neither of which can be operationalized using only price/technical indicators. Fundamental announcements and market sentiment shifts require external data feeds or news sentiment scores not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Encoded volume above 50th percentile using vol_ratio_20 threshold. Encoded pullback/continuation by checking ATR expansion. Direction is context-dependent per signal specification. Exit conditions include thesis reversal (approximated as directional close reversal) and time-based holding period. The core signal logic regarding informed traders moving first on fundamental news cannot be fully captured without fundamental/sentiment data inputs.
